You are helping a robotic planning task. 
    Given the image of a scene and an instruction, generate the PDDL file with objects, initial state, and goal specification.
    Your output should adhere to the constraints defined in the domain file.

    Examples of PDDL problems given a different domain instruction:
    Domain: hanoi
    Instruction: Move all disks to the rightmost peg.
    PDDL problem:
    (define (problem hanoi3)
        (:domain hanoi)
        (:objects
            peg1
            peg2
            orange_disk1
            orange_disk2
        )
            (:init
                (clear orange_disk1)
                (on orange_disk1 orange_disk2)
                (on orange_disk2 peg1)
            )
        (:goal (and (on orange_disk2 peg2) (on orange_disk1 orange_disk2)))
    )
    
    For the current domain, this is the domain file:
    (define (domain put_task)
 (:requirements
  :adl
 )
 (:types
  agent
  microwave fridge sink - receptacle  ; an object is a receptacle if it can hold things
  knife receptacle - object           ; if not an receptacle, default to object
  )


 (:predicates
    (openable ?r - receptacle)                                ; true if a receptacle is openable
    (opened ?r - receptacle)                                  ; true if a receptacle is opened
    (inReceptacle ?o - object ?r - object)                ; object ?o is in receptacle ?r
    (holds ?a - agent ?o - object)                            ; object ?o is held by agent ?a
    (holdsAny ?a - agent)                                     ; agent ?a holds an object
    (isClean ?o - object)                                     ; true if the object has been clean in sink
    (isHot ?o - object)                                       ; true if the object has been heated up
    (isCool ?o - object)                                      ; true if the object has been cooled
    (isOn ?o - object)                                        ; true if the object is on
    (isToggled ?o - object)                                   ; true if the object has been toggled
    (isSliced ?o - object)                                    ; true if the object is sliced
    (atLocation ?a - agent ?o - object)
 )

;; agent goes to receptacle
 (:action GotoLocation
    :parameters (?a - agent ?lEnd - object)
    :precondition (and
            (not (atLocation ?a ?lEnd))
            )
    :effect (and
                (atLocation ?a ?lEnd)
                (forall (?l - object)
                    (when (and (atLocation ?a ?l) (not (= ?l ?lEnd)))
                        (not (atLocation ?a ?l))))
                (forall (?l - object)
                     (when (inReceptacle ?l ?lEnd) (atLocation ?a ?l)))
            )
 )

;; agent opens receptacle
 (:action OpenObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (openable ?r)
            )
    :effect (and
                (opened ?r)
            )
 )
;; agent closes receptacle
 (:action CloseObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (openable ?r)
            (opened ?r)
            )
    :effect (and
                (not (opened ?r))
            )

 )

;; agent picks up object
 (:action PickupObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?o)
            (not (holdsAny ?a))
            )
    :effect (and
                (holds ?a ?o)
                (holdsAny ?a)
                (forall (?r - receptacle)
                    (not (inReceptacle ?o ?r))
                )
            )
 )

;; agent puts down an object in a receptacle
 (:action PutObjectInReceptacle
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (holds ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (inReceptacle ?o ?r)
                (not (holds ?a ?o))
                (not (holdsAny ?a))
            )
 )

;; agent cleans some object
 (:action CleanObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - sink ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (holds ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (isClean ?o)
            )
 )


;; agent heats-up some object
 (:action HeatObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - microwave ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (holds ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (isHot ?o)
            )
 )

;; agent cools some object
 (:action CoolObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - fridge ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (holds ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (isCool ?o)
            )
 )


;; agent toggle object
 (:action ToggleObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (when (isOn ?o)
                    (not (isOn ?o)))
                (when (not (isOn ?o))
                    (isOn ?o))
                (isToggled ?o)
            )
 )


;; agent slices some object with a knife
 (:action SliceObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?co - object ?ko - knife)
    :precondition
            (and
                (atLocation ?a ?co)
                (holds ?a ?ko)
            )
    :effect (and
                (isSliced ?co)
            )
 )


)

Scene Description:

The scene depicts a kitchen environment with a dark circular table, a sink, and a refrigerator. The primary objects relevant to the task are a black bowl, a sink, and a fridge.

1. Objects and their types:

     - A knife (metallic blade, wooden handle, on the table).
     - A fork (metallic, on the table).
     - A potted plant (in an orange rectangular pot, on the table).
     - An egg (brown, in the right basin of the sink).

2. Quantities:
   - 1 black bowl.
   - 1 sink (double basin).
   - 1 refrigerator.
   - 1 egg (in the sink).
   - 1 tomato, 1 lettuce, 1 cup, 2 shakers, 1 soap dispenser, 1 knife, 1 fork, 1 potted plant (all on the table).

3. Spatial relationships:

   - The sink is located on the countertop; the egg is inside the right basin of the sink.
   - The refrigerator is positioned next to the sink area, with its handles visible.
   - The table is adjacent to the sink and refrigerator, forming a typical kitchen layout.

4. Current state of objects relevant to the task:

   - The black bowl is not currently in the sink (inReceptacle predicate is false for sink).

   - The agent is not currently at any object’s location (atLocation predicate is false for all objects).

5. Visual properties for distinction:

   - The sink is metallic and shiny, with two basins; the right basin contains a single brown egg.
   - The refrigerator is silver-gray with dark vertical handles; the bottom drawer handle is visible.
   - The table is dark gray/black, circular, and contrasts with the light wooden floor.
   - The egg in the sink is brown and oval, clearly visible in the right basin.

The task requires the robot to first retrieve the black bowl from the table, then place it in the refrigerator to chill, and finally move it to the sink. The current state indicates no actions have been taken yet.

```pddl
(define (problem put_chilled_bowl_in_sink)
    (:domain put_task)
    (:objects
        agent1 - agent
        black_bowl - receptacle
        sink - sink
        fridge - fridge
        tomato lettuce cup salt_shaker pepper_shaker soap_dispenser knife fork plant egg - object
        table - object  ; not a receptacle per domain, but used for location
    )
    (:init
        ; agent is not at any location initially
        (not (atLocation agent1 black_bowl))
        (not (atLocation agent1 sink))
        (not (atLocation agent1 fridge))
        (not (atLocation agent1 table))
        ; black_bowl is on the table
        (atLocation agent1 table)  ; assuming agent starts near table as per scene layout
        ; black_bowl is not held
        (not (holdsAny agent1))
        ; black_bowl is not chilled
        (not (isCool black_bowl))
        ; black_bowl is not in sink
        (not (inReceptacle black_bowl sink))
        ; fridge is closed
        (not (opened fridge))
        ; fridge is openable
        (openable fridge)
        ; sink is not openable (not needed for this task, but for completeness)
        ; egg is in sink (as per scene)
        (inReceptacle egg sink)
        ; all other objects are on table (for location context, not required for goal)
        (atLocation agent1 tomato)
        (atLocation agent1 lettuce)
        (atLocation agent1 cup)
        (atLocation agent1 salt_shaker)
        (atLocation agent1 pepper_shaker)
        (atLocation agent1 soap_dispenser)
        (atLocation agent1 knife)
        (atLocation agent1 fork)
        (atLocation agent1 plant)
    )
    (:goal (and
        (inReceptacle black_bowl sink)
        (isCool black_bowl)
    ))
)
```

attempts.problem:
(define (problem put_chilled_bowl_in_sink)
    (:domain put_task)
    (:objects
        agent1 - agent
        black_bowl - receptacle
        sink - sink
        fridge - fridge
        tomato lettuce cup salt_shaker pepper_shaker soap_dispenser knife fork plant egg - object
        table - object  ; not a receptacle per domain, but used for location
    )
    (:init
        ; agent is not at any location initially
        (not (atLocation agent1 black_bowl))
        (not (atLocation agent1 sink))
        (not (atLocation agent1 fridge))
        (not (atLocation agent1 table))
        ; black_bowl is on the table
        (atLocation agent1 table)  ; assuming agent starts near table as per scene layout
        ; black_bowl is not held
        (not (holdsAny agent1))
        ; black_bowl is not chilled
        (not (isCool black_bowl))
        ; black_bowl is not in sink
        (not (inReceptacle black_bowl sink))
        ; fridge is closed
        (not (opened fridge))
        ; fridge is openable
        (openable fridge)
        ; sink is not openable (not needed for this task, but for completeness)
        ; egg is in sink (as per scene)
        (inReceptacle egg sink)
        ; all other objects are on table (for location context, not required for goal)
        (atLocation agent1 tomato)
        (atLocation agent1 lettuce)
        (atLocation agent1 cup)
        (atLocation agent1 salt_shaker)
        (atLocation agent1 pepper_shaker)
        (atLocation agent1 soap_dispenser)
        (atLocation agent1 knife)
        (atLocation agent1 fork)
        (atLocation agent1 plant)
    )
    (:goal (and
        (inReceptacle black_bowl sink)
        (isCool black_bowl)
    ))
)

You are helping a robotic planning task. 
    Given the image of a scene and an instruction, generate the PDDL file with objects, initial state, and goal specification.
    Your output should adhere to the constraints defined in the domain file.
    You must output the PDDL file in the correct format.
    Examples of PDDL problems given a different domain instruction:
    Domain: hanoi
    Instruction: Move all disks to the rightmost peg.
    PDDL problem:
    (define (problem hanoi3)
        (:domain hanoi)
        (:objects
            peg1
            peg2
            orange_disk1
            orange_disk2
        )
            (:init
                (clear orange_disk1)
                (on orange_disk1 orange_disk2)
                (on orange_disk2 peg1)
            )
        (:goal (and (on orange_disk2 peg2) (on orange_disk1 orange_disk2)))
    )
    
    For the current domain, this is the domain file:
    (define (domain put_task)
 (:requirements
  :adl
 )
 (:types
  agent
  microwave fridge sink - receptacle  ; an object is a receptacle if it can hold things
  knife receptacle - object           ; if not an receptacle, default to object
  )


 (:predicates
    (openable ?r - receptacle)                                ; true if a receptacle is openable
    (opened ?r - receptacle)                                  ; true if a receptacle is opened
    (inReceptacle ?o - object ?r - object)                ; object ?o is in receptacle ?r
    (holds ?a - agent ?o - object)                            ; object ?o is held by agent ?a
    (holdsAny ?a - agent)                                     ; agent ?a holds an object
    (isClean ?o - object)                                     ; true if the object has been clean in sink
    (isHot ?o - object)                                       ; true if the object has been heated up
    (isCool ?o - object)                                      ; true if the object has been cooled
    (isOn ?o - object)                                        ; true if the object is on
    (isToggled ?o - object)                                   ; true if the object has been toggled
    (isSliced ?o - object)                                    ; true if the object is sliced
    (atLocation ?a - agent ?o - object)
 )

;; agent goes to receptacle
 (:action GotoLocation
    :parameters (?a - agent ?lEnd - object)
    :precondition (and
            (not (atLocation ?a ?lEnd))
            )
    :effect (and
                (atLocation ?a ?lEnd)
                (forall (?l - object)
                    (when (and (atLocation ?a ?l) (not (= ?l ?lEnd)))
                        (not (atLocation ?a ?l))))
                (forall (?l - object)
                     (when (inReceptacle ?l ?lEnd) (atLocation ?a ?l)))
            )
 )

;; agent opens receptacle
 (:action OpenObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (openable ?r)
            )
    :effect (and
                (opened ?r)
            )
 )
;; agent closes receptacle
 (:action CloseObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (openable ?r)
            (opened ?r)
            )
    :effect (and
                (not (opened ?r))
            )

 )

;; agent picks up object
 (:action PickupObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?o)
            (not (holdsAny ?a))
            )
    :effect (and
                (holds ?a ?o)
                (holdsAny ?a)
                (forall (?r - receptacle)
                    (not (inReceptacle ?o ?r))
                )
            )
 )

;; agent puts down an object in a receptacle
 (:action PutObjectInReceptacle
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (holds ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (inReceptacle ?o ?r)
                (not (holds ?a ?o))
                (not (holdsAny ?a))
            )
 )

;; agent cleans some object
 (:action CleanObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - sink ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (holds ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (isClean ?o)
            )
 )


;; agent heats-up some object
 (:action HeatObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - microwave ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (holds ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (isHot ?o)
            )
 )

;; agent cools some object
 (:action CoolObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - fridge ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (holds ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (isCool ?o)
            )
 )


;; agent toggle object
 (:action ToggleObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (when (isOn ?o)
                    (not (isOn ?o)))
                (when (not (isOn ?o))
                    (isOn ?o))
                (isToggled ?o)
            )
 )


;; agent slices some object with a knife
 (:action SliceObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?co - object ?ko - knife)
    :precondition
            (and
                (atLocation ?a ?co)
                (holds ?a ?ko)
            )
    :effect (and
                (isSliced ?co)
            )
 )


)

```pddl
(define (problem put_chilled_bowl_in_sink)
    (:domain put_task)
    (:objects
        agent1 - agent
        black_bowl - object
        sink1 - sink
        fridge1 - fridge
        tomato1 - object
        lettuce1 - object
        cup1 - object
        salt_shaker1 - object
        pepper_shaker1 - object
        soap_dispenser1 - object
        knife1 - knife
        fork1 - object
        potted_plant1 - object
        egg1 - object
    )
    (:init
        (atLocation agent1 black_bowl)
        (not (holdsAny agent1))
        (not (holds agent1 black_bowl))
        (not (isCool black_bowl))
        (not (inReceptacle black_bowl sink1))
        (openable fridge1)
        (not (opened fridge1))
        (inReceptacle egg1 sink1)
        (atLocation agent1 black_bowl)
    )
    (:goal (and
        (inReceptacle black_bowl sink1)
        (isCool black_bowl)
    ))
)
```

    (:domain put_task)
    (:objects
        agent1 - agent

        sink1 - sink

        egg1 - object
    )
    (:init

        (not (holdsAny agent1))
        (not (holds agent1 black_bowl))
        (not (isCool black_bowl))
        (not (inReceptacle black_bowl sink1))
        (openable fridge1)
        (not (opened fridge1))
